title: [Bleeping Computer] New stealthy Quasar Linux malware targets software developers
summary: A previously undocumented Linux implant named Quasar Linux (QLNX) is targeting developers' systems with a mix of rootkit, backdoor, and credential-stealing capabilities. [...]

title: [Bleeping Computer] DAEMON Tools trojanized in supply-chain attack to deploy backdoor
summary: Hackers trojanized installers for the DAEMON Tools software and since April 8, delivered a backdoor to thousands of systems that downloaded the product from the official website. [...]

title: [Bleeping Computer] Student hacked Taiwan high-speed rail to trigger emergency brakes
